regeneration.name: Regeneration
regeneration.description: Slowly regenerate HP during combat (2 HP per turn).

wolverine.name: Wolverine
wolverine.description: Regenerate 5 HP per turn after combat ends.

heavy_lead.name: Heavy Lead
heavy_lead.description: Shotgun and LMG damage increased by 10%.

pump_it_louder.name: Pump it Louder!
pump_it_louder.description: Shotguns can now knock back enemies, reducing their next attack by 20%.

skeet_shooter.name: Skeet Shooter
skeet_shooter.description: Shotgun critical hit chance increased by 5%.

crushing_blows.name: Crushing Blows
crushing_blows.description: Blunt weapon attacks deal 15% more damage.

flurry.name: Flurry
flurry.description: 25% chance to attack twice with melee weapons.

thrash.name: Thrash
thrash.description: Each successful melee hit reduces enemy armor by 3 for the rest of combat.

eagle_eye.name: Eagle Eye
eagle_eye.description: Rifle accuracy increased. +5% crit chance with rifles.

bullet_time.name: Bullet Time
bullet_time.description: Killing an enemy with a rifle grants a free bonus attack.

commando.name: Commando
commando.description: SMG and rifle damage increased by 15%.

gunslinger.name: Gunslinger
gunslinger.description: Pistol and revolver critical damage increased by 20%.

dead_center.name: Dead Center
dead_center.description: +10% pistol damage in the first round of combat.

high_noon.name: High Noon
high_noon.description: Guaranteed critical hit on the first attack of each combat.

predator.name: Predator
predator.description: Blade critical hits cause bleeding (10 damage per turn for 2 turns).

death_blossom.name: Death Blossom
death_blossom.description: Once per combat, attack all enemies simultaneously with blades.

tesla.name: Tesla
tesla.description: Tech weapon charged shots deal 15% more damage.

mass_vulnerability.name: Mass Vulnerability
mass_vulnerability.description: Breach Protocol reduces enemy armor by 15% for 3 turns.

datamine_mastermind.name: Datamine Mastermind
datamine_mastermind.description: Earn 50% more eddies from hacking terminals and data shards.

almost_in.name: Almost In!
almost_in.description: Breach Protocol applies two random debuffs instead of one.

signal_support.name: Signal Support
signal_support.description: RAM recovery increased by 1 per turn.

i_spy.name: I Spy
i_spy.description: Using Breach Protocol reveals the enemy's full stat profile.

hacker_overlord.name: Hacker Overlord
hacker_overlord.description: Quickhacks have a 20% chance to chain to nearby enemies.

composure.name: Composure
composure.description: Armor increased by 5% while in combat.

ghost.name: Ghost
ghost.description: First attack from stealth deals 30% bonus damage.

silent_and_deadly.name: Silent and Deadly
silent_and_deadly.description: Stealth kills grant bonus XP and do not alert other enemies.

return_to_sender.name: Return to Sender
return_to_sender.description: 20% chance to reflect 25% of incoming damage back at the attacker.

assassin.name: Assassin
assassin.description: Bonus damage against targets above 50% HP.

sniper.name: Sniper
sniper.description: Sniper rifle critical damage multiplier increased to 3x.
